globalAttributes.name: class
globalAttributes.description: The class attribute specifies one or more classnames for an element.

globalAttributes.name: id
globalAttributes.description: The id attribute specifies a unique id for an HTML element.

globalAttributes.name: style
globalAttributes.description: The style attribute specifies an inline style for an element.

globalAttributes.name: title
globalAttributes.description: The title attribute specifies extra information about an element.

globalAttributes.name: src
globalAttributes.description: The URL of the external resource to be used by the element.

globalAttributes.name: href
globalAttributes.description: The URL of a linked resource.

globalAttributes.name: alt
globalAttributes.description: The alternate text for an image or other resource.

globalAttributes.name: placeholder
globalAttributes.description: A hint to the user of what can be entered in the control.

globalAttributes.name: asok-state
globalAttributes.description: Define reactive local state for a component. Example: asok-state="{ count: 0 }"

globalAttributes.name: asok-text
globalAttributes.description: Set the text content of an element reactively. Example: asok-text="'Count: ' + count"

globalAttributes.name: asok-show
globalAttributes.description: Toggle element visibility (display: none) based on a truthy/falsy value. Example: asok-show="isVisible"

globalAttributes.name: asok-hide
globalAttributes.description: Hide element (display: none) based on a truthy/falsy value. Example: asok-hide="isHidden"

globalAttributes.name: asok-class
globalAttributes.description: Dynamic class binding. Supports string expressions or object literals. Example: asok-class="{ 'active': isOpen }"

globalAttributes.name: asok-class:
globalAttributes.description: Toggle a specific class based on a truthy value. Example: asok-class:active="isOpen"

globalAttributes.name: asok-bind:
globalAttributes.description: Bind any HTML attribute reactively. Example: asok-bind:href="url"

globalAttributes.name: asok-model
globalAttributes.description: Two-way data binding for form inputs (input, select, textarea). Example: asok-model="email"

globalAttributes.name: asok-on:
globalAttributes.description: Listen for DOM events. Supports modifiers like .prevent, .stop, .debounce-300, .outside. Example: asok-on:click="count++"

globalAttributes.name: asok-for
globalAttributes.description: Iterate over an array. Use on a <template> tag. Example: <template asok-for="item in items">

globalAttributes.name: asok-if
globalAttributes.description: Conditional rendering. Element is removed from DOM if false. Use on a <template> tag. Example: <template asok-if="user.is_admin">

globalAttributes.name: asok-elif
globalAttributes.description: Else-if conditional rendering. Example: <template asok-elif="user.is_authenticated">

globalAttributes.name: asok-else
globalAttributes.description: Else conditional rendering. Example: <template asok-else>

globalAttributes.name: asok-fetch
globalAttributes.description: Declarative GET request. Updates component state automatically. Example: asok-fetch="/api/users"

globalAttributes.name: asok-fetch-as
globalAttributes.description: Variable name for fetched data (default: 'data'). Example: asok-fetch-as="users"

globalAttributes.name: asok-fetch-on
globalAttributes.description: Trigger event for fetching (default: 'load'). Example: asok-fetch-on="click"

globalAttributes.name: asok-fetch-async
globalAttributes.description: Custom async expression for fetching data. Example: asok-fetch-async="data = await fetch('/api').then(r => r.json())"

globalAttributes.name: asok-ref
globalAttributes.description: Get a reference to an element, accessible via $refs. Example: asok-ref="myInput"

globalAttributes.name: asok-init
globalAttributes.description: Run code when the component initializes. Example: asok-init="loadData()"

globalAttributes.name: asok-teleport
globalAttributes.description: Render content in a different DOM location. Use on a <template> tag. Example: <template asok-teleport="#modal-root">

globalAttributes.name: asok-transition
globalAttributes.description: Animate element when updated via Reactive Engine or Live Updates. Values: fade, slide, scale. Example: asok-transition="fade 300"

globalAttributes.name: asok-cloak
globalAttributes.description: Hide element until directives are initialized to prevent Flash of Unstyled Content (FOUC).

globalAttributes.name: data-block
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: target template block name to render and replace. Example: data-block="results"

globalAttributes.name: data-target
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: override the target element selector. Example: data-target="#other-element"

globalAttributes.name: data-url
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: explicit URL for the fetch request. Example: data-url="/search"

globalAttributes.name: data-method
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: HTTP method (GET or POST). Example: data-method="POST"

globalAttributes.name: data-trigger
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: event that triggers the request. Example: data-trigger="input delay:300ms"

globalAttributes.name: data-swap
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: strategy for swapping HTML.

globalAttributes.name: data-push-url
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: update browser history URL after swap. Example: data-push-url="/new-page"

globalAttributes.name: data-action
globalAttributes.description: Asok Form Actions: specify action handler in page module. Example: data-action="save_profile"

globalAttributes.name: data-indicator
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: element to show loading state. Example: data-indicator="#spinner"

globalAttributes.name: data-disable
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: disable form buttons during request.

globalAttributes.name: data-include
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: CSS selector for other inputs to include. Example: data-include=".filters"

globalAttributes.name: data-confirm
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: show confirm() dialog before firing. Example: data-confirm="Are you sure?"

globalAttributes.name: data-sse
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: open SSE stream and swap on each message. Example: data-sse="/events/notifications"

globalAttributes.name: data-subscribe
globalAttributes.description: Asok Live Updates: subscribe to real-time model changes. Example: data-subscribe="model:Post:123"

globalAttributes.name: ws-click
globalAttributes.description: Asok Reactive: trigger server-side method on click via WebSockets. Example: ws-click="increment"

globalAttributes.name: ws-input
globalAttributes.description: Asok Reactive: trigger server-side method on input via WebSockets. Example: ws-input="updateSearch"

globalAttributes.name: ws-submit
globalAttributes.description: Asok Reactive: trigger server-side method on form submit via WebSockets. Example: ws-submit="saveForm"
